title: Adapter Profile
description: Schema for Adapter EOSC Resource (Adapter profile for EOSC Registry).

LinkedResource.description: Reference to an EOSC Service or EOSC Interoperability Guideline that this adapter supports.

resourceID.description: Unique ID of the linked resource (must exist in the Registry).

Creator.description: A person or legal entity responsible for producing the adapter/artifact.

role.description: Role of the creator (use Credit vocabulary where possible).

PIDSchema.description: PID schema used for creator identifier (e.g. ORCID).

PID.description: Creator identifier according to the chosen PID schema.

affiliationName.description: Organizational or institutional affiliation of the creator.

affiliationIdentifier.description: Identifier for the affiliation (e.g. ROR.org, ISNI, Wikidata).

PackageRelease.description: A package or release artifact for the adapter (e.g. PyPI, Docker image, GitHub release).

url.description: Link to the package release page or specific release.

packageType.description: Type of package (e.g. PyPI, Docker, GitHub, NPM, etc). Manager, format, or repository.

notes.description: Optional notes about this release (compatibility, platform constraints).

type.description: QA badge type (documentation, license, testing, etc.).

admins.description: List of users that are admins of the adapter

catalogueId.description: The ID of the catalogue this adapter originates from

changeLog.description: Changes in the latest version (short HTML or plain text)

description.description: Long description of the adapter (HTML allowed)

id.description: Unique resource/entry ID (unique identifier for this adapter record)

lastUpdate.description: Latest update date of the adapter catalogue record (ISO 8601 date)

license.description: Software/Code license (use SPDX identifiers where possible). See https://spdx.org/licenses/

linkedResource.description: EOSC Service or Guideline reference that this adapter supports

logo.description: Logo image link. Accepts PNG or JPEG.

node.description: Implementation node or deployment identifier (format TBD)

programmingLanguage.description: Programming language (use controlled vocabulary where possible)

releases.description: List of package releases for the adapter

repository.description: Code repository webpage (eg, GitHub repository). Prefer link to specific release or tag.

creators.description: The main creators/authors involved in producing the adapter.

notes.description: Extra notes and QA badges (software quality scores/badges).
